title: AoA Website
description: A responsive gaming community website built using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap. Designed with a themed interface to match the Path of Titans environment, focusing on user engagement and clean navigation across devices.

title: Apartment Finder
description: A responsive web application designed to help users explore and view apartment listings. Focused on intuitive layout, structured data presentation, and improving the overall browsing experience.

title: Calculator
description: A functional calculator application built with JavaScript, supporting real-time calculations and user input handling with a clean, responsive interface.

title: To Do List
description: A dynamic task management application that allows users to add, track, and remove tasks. Built to demonstrate interactive JavaScript functionality and practical UI design.

title: Travel Planning Website
description: A responsive travel planning website designed to help organize itineraries and trip details. Focused on usability, layout clarity, and structured content flow.
